caption: A man with a shaved head and a full dark beard is recorded in a studio setting against a backdrop of grey acoustic foam panels. He wears black over-ear headphones and a plain white t-shirt, with tattoos visible on his right arm. A professional condenser microphone, held by a boom arm, is positioned directly in front of him. The text " Rode NT1-A" is printed on the microphone's mounting hardware. As the sequence progresses, the man speaks, causing subtle changes in his facial expression and mouth movements. He appears to be engaged in a conversation or recording a podcast. While his head remains relatively stationary, his expression shifts from a neutral look to one of active speaking, and his hand is briefly visible moving in the periphery of the shot.
